description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a bright red body and a black band around its midsection. The top features a prominent silver handle and lever mechanism, with a black hose attached near the top and secured along the side, ending in a nozzle at the base. The front of the extinguisher displays a white instructional label with text and pictograms, indicating it is a carbon dioxide fire extinguisher. The body appears to be made of metal, likely steel, with a smooth, glossy finish. The hose is flexible and rubbery, contrasting with the rigid, metallic main body. The overall design is functional and robust, suitable for emergency use in urban environments.
description: A tall, red metal fire extinguisher with a silver handle, black hose, and a white instructional label on the front. The extinguisher has a glossy finish and a sturdy, functional appearance.
description_view_0: The extinguisher is seen from the side, showing the red cylindrical body, silver handle, and the black hose running down the side.
description_view_1: A rear view highlighting the black hose running vertically along the back and the absence of any visible label.
description_view_2: The front view displays the white instructional label, the silver handle, and the black hose, making the label and usage instructions clearly visible.
description_view_3: A side-rear view showing mostly the red body and the black hose, with the label partially visible on the side.
attribute_label_or_signage: A white rectangular instructional label with red and black text and pictograms is present on the front of the cylinder.
attribute_mounting_bracket_or_holder: A black strap or band is visible around the midsection, likely serving as a mounting or securing bracket.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black hose is attached near the top, running down the side and ending in a nozzle at the base, secured by the strap.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A metallic safety pin is visible near the handle mechanism at the top.
